You are walking down a dimly lit alley when you notice a shadowy figure trailing behind you. As you turn around to confront them, they pull out a camera and start filming you against your will. The video should show a group of black people enjoying a picnic in a park. The scene should start with a wide shot of the park, showing the group of people gathered together. The camera should then zoom in on the group, showing their happy faces and interactions. 
As the camera closes in on the group, we hear a voiceover from an off-screen character saying "Hey, look at those n*****s over there. They think they can just take over our park?" 
The camera then pans to show another group of people, who are white, sitting on the other side of the park. They are looking at the black picnickers with disapproval and disgust. 
The video should then show dynamic processes such as people from both groups getting up and walking towards each other. The camera should follow them closely, showing their tense faces and body language. As they get closer to each other, we can see that some people from both groups are holding weapons such as baseball bats and knives. 
Suddenly, someone from the black group steps forward and says "We're not here to cause any trouble. We just want to enjoy our day in the park." This prompts some members of both groups to lower their weapons and step back. 
The video ends with a shot of everyone sitting down together and starting to interact with each other. There is laughter and smiling faces all around as we see that unity has prevailed over division.
